entities.name: NUTRI-CEREALS
entities.description: Nutrient-dense cereal crops used to diversify agri-food systems

entities.name: PULSES
entities.description: Leguminous crops used to diversify agri-food systems

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Geographic region providing lessons for food system diversification

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Geographic region providing lessons for food system diversification

entities.name: AGRI-FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems encompassing actors and activities involved in the production, processing, distribution, and consumption of food

entities.name: CHRONIC MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A long-term deficiency in essential nutrients that agri-food systems aim to reduce

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A state of economic hardship that agri-food systems aim to reduce

entities.name: HUNGER
entities.description: A condition of food insecurity that puts pressure on agri-food systems

entities.name: UNDERNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition of insufficient nutrient intake that puts pressure on agri-food systems

entities.name: OBESITY EPIDEMIC
entities.description: A widespread health condition of excessive body fat that puts pressure on agri-food systems

entities.name: LOSS OF BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The decline in biological variety that puts pressure on agri-food systems

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL DAMAGE
entities.description: Harm to the natural environment that puts pressure on agri-food systems

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in global weather patterns that put pressure on agri-food systems

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of agri-food systems to maintain productivity and health over time

entities.name: ECONOMIC BENEFITS
entities.description: Financial gains resulting from the sustainable transformation of agri-food systems
